place every Fall, EECS Day is our annual open house, providing prospective students in high-school and their parents with an opportunity to learn firsthand what it is like to study EECS at UC Berkeley. The day’s activities typically include a departm

. The day’s activities typically include a department tour, various hands-on EECS workshops and demos, and the chance to speak to UC Berkeley professors and students on their personal experiences. For those not yet in high school but are still eager

those not yet in high school but are still eager to learn about EECS at Cal, HKN hosts Junior EECS Day in the Spring. This year, EECS Day will be hosted virtually over Zoom. In addition, we have invited special faculty guest Professor Dan Garcia to

ted special faculty guest Professor Dan Garcia to speak on his work with the GamesCrafters group. Come join us for a fun-filled day of learning CS! Event Details: Saturday November 21st, 2020 from 1:00 p.m. to 4:45 p.m. Registration: To register, ple
